title.value: DirectTrust Use Case SERV_DESC Code System

name.value: DirectTrust (Lisa Nelson); 629 K Street NW Suite 300; Washington, DC 20006

description.value:
The system of codes to express the use cases for a Direct endpoint.
See [https://objects.directtrust.org/standards/terminology/codeSystem/ServDescCS.json](https://objects.directtrust.org/standards/terminology/codeSystem/ServDescCS.json).

copyright.value: The Direct Standard® data element labels and mappings to content from HL7 Version 2 are incorporated from *ANSI/DS2020-03-101-2024 - Event Notifications via the Direct Standard™ Release Version 1.1 - US Realm*, which is licensed under Creative Commons "No Rights Reserved" (CC0) by [DirectTrust.org](http://directtrust.org/), Inc. The Direct Standard™ is a trademark owned by [DirectTrust.org](http://directtrust.org/), Inc.

comment.value: This is the URL as specified by the terminology owner, and is considered authoritative.
